title: Lib Folder
description: This is a 'master' lib folder, including files from many prominent members of the community. All scripts hosted here will be setup to use this lib. The base lib folder comes from: https://github.com/cmann1/DustScripts

title: Module Folder
description: Some scripts will use this folder. Folder comes from: https://github.com/cmann1/DustScripts

title: Script Template - Editor
description: A template file to build your own scripts

title: Script Template - Main
description: A template file to build your own scripts

title: Script Template - Main Alternate
description: A template file to build your own scripts

title: Script Template - Player
description: A template file to build your own scripts

title: Script Template - Pool
description: A template file to build your own scripts

title: Script Template - Queue
description: A template file to build your own scripts

title: Script Template - Subframe
description: A template file to build your own scripts

title: Script Template - Trigger
description: A template file to build your own scripts

title: Action Character Swap (No RNG)
description: Swap character based on actions such as jumping and attacking.

title: Action Character Swap (RNG)
description: Swap character based on actions such as jumping and attacking randomly.

title: Air Charge Refresh Trigger
description: Trigger refreshes air charge

title: Apple Goal Counter
description: Set the number of apples to be hit to clear level

title: Apple Respawn
description: Respawn one apple one time

title: Apple Spawner Trigger
description: Trigger zone spawns apple as well as destroys apple. Can choose launch speed. Spawning an apple creates a flag, and destorying it deletes flag for completion reasons.

title: Apple Zone Destroys Tiles
description: Declare an apple zone, as well a rectangular zone to be deleted when a tile is brought into it

title: Arrow Simon Says
description: Using a trigger, define Arrow directions and attack types to give back air charges. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/10132/simon-says

title: Avalanche
description: Set props to be your avalanche as well as optional choices to embed sound files. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12101/the-alps

title: Baby Park
description: Place down lap triggers causing lap counter to increment 1. NOTE: Lap counter is placed on HUD and does not line up with mouse movement in game world

title: Background Gameplay
description: Character appears in parallax background layers. Layer 15 is redrawn as the collision layers. Can use trigger to swap back to layer 19

title: Balloon On Hit
description: Grow bigger on hit of an entity. Can embed sound file.

title: Become Entity
description: Become any enemy and gain their power!

title: Blindfold
description: Can't see anything other than HUD'

title: Bounce Zone
description: Create a bounce zone with a trigger

title: Breakable Tiles
description: Choose individual tiles to be broken upon hit

title: Breakable Wall
description: Choose a zone to be broken upon hit. Can change the health of tiles

title: Change Attack Damage
description: Changes attack damage of light and heavy attacks

title: Character Swap
description: Swap characters with taunt

title: Character Unlock Trigger
description: Unlock characters by hitting a trigger zone. Swap character with taunt

title: Clear Room Teleport
description: Clear a defined zone of dust and entities to teleport

title: Clone Spawner
description: Spawn a clone of the player

title: Clunk
description: Enables clunk-like physics without needing to move the tiles

title: Combo Manager
description: Gives control of combo loss conditions

title: Cross Beams
description: Beam trigger is tied to player and will shoot at a modified delay. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12941/crucifixion

title: Ground Combo
description: While touching the ground gain combo meter

title: Delayed Teleport
description: Teleport trigger that activates after X number of frames

title: Disable Anything Manager
description: Create trigger zones to disable attacks, jumps, and individual movements. Can have each trigger activated once or multiple times

title: Dust Respawner Zone
description: Dust will respawn in declared zone

title: Edge Toggle Distance
description: Can disable edge collision or enable edge collision depending if player is in trigger zone

title: End Zone Mystery
description: Hard set coordinates in script. If player enters coordiantes end the level

title: Enemies Don't Hurt
description: Enemies can attack but do no damage

title: Enemy Health Controller
description: Control the health of all enemies in a level

title: Enemy Manager
description: Control enemy health, move speed, and attack speed

title: Entity Follower
description: Can link a child entity to follow a parent entity

title: Entity Teleporter
description: Trigger zone that can teleports an entity

title: Fast
description: Dashing, jumping and downdashing retains and increases speed, most friction has been removed, and there is no terminal velocity

title: Final Tire Boss
description: Turn a tire into a final boss! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/14296/revenge-of-pinata

title: Flywrench
description: Create lasers that can only be passed while holding jump. White=Default, Red=Jump, Pink=Death. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/9388/ceres

title: Forces Face Right
description: Forces the player to face right at all times

title: Force Player Actions
description: Force player to perform certain actions every actionable frame

title: Gravity switcher
description: Switches the player's gravity! Can also control fog color during switch

title: Hittable Zone
description: Define an invisible zone that can be hit by the player.

title: Hit an Apple
description: Hit a single apple to clear the level

title: Hit An Apple With An Apple
description: Spawns an apple at the player. The player must hit an apple with another apple to end the level

title: Ice Physics
description: Create your own ice rink!

title: Ice Physics 2
description: Create your own ice rink...2!

title: Ice Zones
description: Define a zone which affects player physics, creating simillar physics as to ice

title: Infinite Air Charges
description: Gives the player infinite air charges

title: Infinite Super
description: Gives the player infinite super

title: Instant Actions
description: Perform all actions instantly!

title: Invincible
description: I'm... INVINCIBLE!

title: Jump Character Swap
description: Swap characters on every jump input

title: Katamari Apple
description: Collect all enemies with your apple to beat the level

title: Kill X Apples
description: Kill X apples to beat the level

title: Kingsbird Flight
description: Fly like you do in Kingsbird! Hold light attack and down while falling to generate momentum

title: Laser
description: Use a trigger to create a laser source point. Kills player upon contact. Can use white lab tiles to bounce the laser, and lab glass tiles to allow it to pass through

title: Lava
description: Lava comes up from the bottom of the screen. Run! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12807/escape

title: Lights Off
description: Turns off everything except the player

title: Man-Girl Lock
description: Force Man/Girl on your level. Man = Man/Worth Girl=Girl/Kid

title: Medium Speed
description: Choose a capped speed the player can reach. Adds no friction

title: Moon Trigger
description: Removes all vertical velocity. Has a music embed that can play when trigger is hit. NOTE: Leave value set to 0 otherwise it won't work

title: Multiplayer - Share Combo
description: Share combo between all players in multiplayer

title: Multiplayer - Team Attack
description: Hit your team in multiplayer

title: No Aircharge
description: Removes all aircharges from the player

title: No Bob
description: Removes all bob from floating enemies

title: No Clip
description: Player can fall through all collision tiles

title: No Direction
description: Removes any use of the directional inputs

title: No Hitrise
description: Removes hitrise when hitting enemies

title: No Dust Spread
description: Killed enemies no longer spread dust

title: Only Move Right
description: Can only move right, no backtracking!

title: Pacifist
description: Clear all dust without attacking any entities to end the level

title: Player Shadow Chase
description: Shadows that copy the exact movement of the player chase you. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/14379/old-site

title: Player Wolf
description: Become the Wolf. AWOOOOOO

title: Pogo
description: Bounce forever, can gain momentum through downdashing and speed transfering

title: Porcupine Fire Speed
description: Change the fire speed of porcupines

title: Porcupines Off
description: Turn off porcupines from attacking

title: Prism Replacer - Slime Barrel
description: Replace all prisms with slime barrels

title: Redlight Greenlight
description: Don't get caught moving while its red! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/14239/downtown

title: Reducer
description: Turn an enemy big with extra health! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/10189/reducer

title: Remote Bomb
description: Place a bomb with heavy attack and activate it to attack the area! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/10880/we-got-a-timebomb

title: Remove Enemy AI
description: Turn off all enemy AI

title: Reverse Coyote Jump
description: If you jump too close to a ledge you won't get an aircharge

title: Reverse Slopeboost
description: You think you are going one way, but actually...

title: Shy Blocks
description: Declare 'shy zones'. Tiles in these zones will disappear when the player looks at them

title: Single Ground Dash
description: Can only dash one time on the ground. Can be refreshed by jumping

title: Slow
description: Set maximum player speed

title: Someone Wins
description: ID is hard coded into the file. Allows a trigger zone of tiles to disappear if matching ID plays the level.

title: Speed Check
description: Checks if the player has the matching units to pass through trigger

title: Speed Boost Zone
description: Gives the player a boost to their X Y within a given trigger. Boost is dash activated and the player must be facing right.

title: Start Speed
description: Gives an initial boost of XY speed off of 3,2,1 countdown

title: Sticky Totems
description: Other entities stick to moving totems

title: Stoneboss Boss
description: Stoneboss' final form

title: Sticky Ground
description: Force the player to move by jumping or dashing off walls. The ground is sticky!

title: Super Killer
description: Kills the player if they haver have super

title: Super Only
description: All attacks become super

title: Taunt Checkpoint
description: Create a player-made checkpoint with Taunt

title: Taunt Invincibility
description: Become invincible by using Taunt!

title: Taunt Noclip
description: Activate Noclip with Taunt

title: Taunt Respawn
description: Teleport to the start of the level carrying any momentum

title: Taunt Size Changer
description: Use Taunt to grow bigger and use Taunt+Down to grow smaller

title: Totem Spam Ledgecancel
description: Get totem spammed if you ledge cancel

title: Treadmill
description: Auto-pushes the player to the right as long as y=0

title: Waves
description: Shoot waves of power from your attacks!

title: Apple Replace
description: Replace the apple sprite with a custom image

title: Blink
description: Cause the set layer to swap between two colors

title: Blurry
description: Force the entire screen to be blurry

title: Camera Wobble
description: Force the camera to wobble back and forth

title: Change Dustspread
description: Change the dustspread in the level to any of the other filth types

title: City Clock
description: Create a real-time clock out of city props

title: Corpse Knockback
description: Have the corpse of the enemy kill go flying!

title: Create Glass
description: Define a region to be a act similar to a pane of glass. No reflection

title: Custom Images
description: Put custom images into your level

title: Custom Props
description: Put custom props into your level

title: Dust Type
description: Changes dustspread but also changes all the dust in a given radius to a certain filth type

title: Enemy Cars
description: Turns all enemies into cars. Works best with totems

title: Fog Shift
description: Shift the hue colors of the selected layer

title: Follow Player Camera
description: Have the player always in the center of the camera

title: Gears & Prism Gears
description: Spawn moving gears, but also provide visual gears behind prisms!

title: HUD Text
description: Put text anywhere on the HUD

title: Layer Controller
description: Shift the draw order of layers

title: Layer Dustblocks
description: Put dustblocks on different layers. Useful for fog issues

title: Layer Hider
description: Hide one layer from being drawn

title: Letter Box
description: Create a dramatic movie with this script! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/14378/training-facility

title: Lookahead
description: Allows the player to view the upcoming level. Use TAUNT and directional input to activate

title: Minimap
description: Draws a real-time minimap. Set different colors for apples and entities

title: No HUD
description: Removes the HUD during gameplay

title: Panning Camera
description: Pan the camera between two different spots. Can change the speed of the pan.

title: Parallax Layer Movement
description: Parllax layers constantly shift

title: Penis
description: NSFW - Spawns a Penis made from pops and emitters.

title: Perspective Change Trigger
description: Create a trigger that rotates the perspective of the camera within 360 degrees.

title: Player Backflip
description: Backflip when going over ledges. RADICAL!

title: Player Emitter
description: Change the 'King Zone Red' emittter particles to change player particles. NOTE: Keep value set to 4 otherwise expect lag.

title: Positional Fog
description: Have fog triggers activate based on player position rather than camera position

title: Prism Replace
description: Replace prisms with any image. Needs Embeds.

title: Prop Wind
description: Blow props in the wind!

title: Prop Scrolling
description: Define a region that props will scroll and wrap around

title: Rainbow Stream
description: Use a trigger to create a rainbow stream! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/8584/rainbow-rush

title: Remote Force Camera
description: Force the player onto a specific camera line when they enter the trigger zone

title: Remove Cleansed Animals
description: Removes the animal entities after killing a dusted enemy

title: Shadows
description: Has raycasting along tile edges replicating line of sight.

title: Shadows No Raycast
description: No raycasting on tile edges. Can modify Alpha value. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12173/ruined-chambers

title: Shake Trigger
description: Causes screen to shake while player is in trigger

title: Spin Custom Image
description: Spin that custom image!

title: Spotlight
description: A spotlight that can move back and forth

title: Tentacales
description: Create some spooky tentacles with triggers

title: Totem Replace
description: Replace totem sprite with custom sprite

title: Triangles
description: Create decorative triangles on layer 13

title: Wobble Camera
description: Wobbles the camera back and forth while in trigger zone. Keeps orientation when leaving trigger

title: Entity Outliner
description: Outline all entites as well as modify the outline scale

title: Hat - Bunny Ears
description: Give Dustman some Bunny Ears!

title: Hat - Custom
description: Wear any type of hat you want!

title: Hat - Santa Hat
description: Give Dustman a Santa Hat!

title: Seamless
description: Use a seamless texture to create a seamlss background! Can modify alpha value. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/13090/cyclone

title: Time Of Day Fog
description: Modify the fog trigger in a level according to the players system clock

title: Custom Music
description: Add custom music to your level

title: Enemy Death Sound
description: Play a custom sound when an enemy dies

title: Metronome
description: Spawn a metronome sound trigger at an X,Y location. No embeds needed

title: Multiple Custom Music Triggers
description: Embed mulitple custom songs and tie their playing to triggers

title: One-time Audio
description: Play a custom audio file one time

title: Auto-jorf Helper
description: Makes jorfs easy

title: Camera Area Path Viewer
description: View the actual area the camera shows in editor

title: Checkpoint Splits
description: Provides in-game splits functionality with checkpoints

title: Collision Rays
description: Shows when player is colliding with a surface

title: Create Information Log
description: Generates a list of statistics every frame to console

title: Default Trigger Plugin
description: Select ANY trigger and use N to save it. Now you can use N to 'reclick' the trigger at any point

title: Generate Entity Information
description: Generate a list of entity information to console

title: Filth Projections
description: More advanced filth projections then built-in dustmod version

title: Fog Trigger Helper
description: Quickly create basic fog triggers

title: Force Camera Path
description: When player enters trigger zone, force player to specific camera path

title: Free Tera
description: Aligns player making teras 'free'

title: ID Entity & Trigger Inspector Plugin
description: Provides the ID when hovering over an entity or trigger in editor

title: Internal Clock Checker
description: Checks the difference between internal game clock and real time. Prints to console

title: Jump Fix On Editor Respawn
description: Gives you an extra aircharge after using editor anywhere

title: Key Door Helper
description: Gives a visual representation of how keys and doors are linked

title: Ledge Cancel Tracker Plugin
description: Check frames spent in hover during a ledge cancel

title: Legacy Low Percent Plugin
description: Due to change in low% behavior, this recreates  deathwarp abuse and ending attack abuse

title: Map Utilities
description: Mass modify levels by quickly changing tiles, filth, or other features

title: On Hurt
description: Tie an event to when an enemy strikes the player

title: Print Time
description: Prints time to console

title: Prop ID Checker
description: Declare a set region and print all prop IDs to console

title: Prop Path
description: Place curved props as well as randomize prop motion

title: Ruler Plugin
description: Use 'A' to measure the distance between blocks. Use 'M' to give coordinates

title: Temporary Spawn
description: Use 'F' to place a temporary spawn, 'ALT+F' to delete

title: Tera Drop Calculator
description: Find how wide a tera is. Use Jump & Taunt to activate the test. Output is printed to console

title: Trigger Time
description: Change Music & Ambience trigger by a numerical value, rather than a slider

title: Twirlie Trainer
description: Provides a visual representation on the timing of twirlies

title: Advance Tools
description: Advance Editor Features. Find up to date and compiled version here: https://github.com/cmann1/adv-tools

title: Dust Tracker 2 Plugin
description: Track dust in the level including entities. Helpful for hard to see, or obscure dust

title: Bastion Stairs
description: Climb the staircase! Use JUMP to proceed and DASH to switch directions. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/11030/bastion-stairs

title: Cassette
description: Jump between platforms in rhythm like the cassette challenges in Celeste! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/10979/cassette-tape

title: Crimson Boss
description: Based off the boss from I Wanna Kill the Kamilia 2. Must embed files. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12640/crimson-boss

title: Golf
description: Time to prove your worth on the golf course! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/11440/par-time-duster

title: Labyrinth
description: I hope your maze find skills are polished! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/11477/labyrinth

title: Marble Roll (Demo)
description: A physics demonstration of 3D Marble movement

title: Multiplayer - Air Hockey
description: Grab a friend and play air hockey! Mouse controls. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12775/air-hockey

title: Multiplayer - Battleship
description: You need two to sink some ships. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/11539/event-horizon

title: Pong
description: A good test of any game's capabilities is if you can play Pong

title: Reaction Test
description: Finish the level by reacting to the commands on screen!

title: Scrabble
description: Description for 16 points. Need to embed a world list 'words.txt'

title: 100m Freestyle
description: Dustforce has never looked this good. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12531/100m-freestyle

title: 3D
description: Dustforce now in 3D!! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/13258/protodimensionetics

title: Batman
description: They think I'm hiding in the shadows, but I am the shadows

title: Canyon Plane Shooter
description: 3D Place Combat

title: Chaos
description: Only for the brave. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12427/the-lab-chaos

title: Chess
description: 400 Elo or bust

title: Dusters Rift
description: What is dustforce was a MOBA?

title: Helping Hands
description: This plugin adds the latest in janitorial accessories!

title: Knighthall Simulator
description: Dustman is causing trouble again. Defend your home! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/9262/knight-hall-simulator

title: Multiplayer - Hot Potato
description: Play hot potato with this plugin!

title: Pokermans
description: Got to catch them all in this plugin! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12747/pokeballs

title: PRNG
description: Create pseduorandom levels. Define pre-made level chunks and combine them together. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/10820/dustforce-arcade

title: Rhythm Force
description: My years of DDR training has made me ready for this. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/11937/rhythmforce-shoot-em-up

title: Rifle
description: Big laser = big fun. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/11174/weapons-facility

title: Rope Dart
description: Use TAUNT to throw the dart and travel as high speeds towards walls. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/9527/way-of-the-ninja

title: Shooter Man
description: Dustforce but with guns

title: Super Meat Boy
description: Is Dustforce just game engine at this point? See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/10361/blood-trail

title: Multiplayer - Survival Balance Patch
description: A multiplayer survival mode balance patch.

title: Target Test
description: Break the targets. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/9910/target-test
